public_site.description: Cinematic, high-contrast editorial look. Storytelling-first, large imagery, minimal navigation.

admin_dashboard.description: High information density, sharp rectangular cards, operational focus, data-heavy.

headings.usage: Editorial, elegant, Vogue-style headings for public site and dashboard section titles.
headings.styles: tracking-tight for large headings. DO NOT USE INTER.

body.usage: Clean, highly legible sans-serif for dashboard UI elements, tables, and dense data.

public_site.container: Max-width with significant breathing room and asymmetry.

admin_dashboard.cards: Sharp edges (rounded-none or max rounded-sm), 1px subtle borders, no soft shadows.
admin_dashboard.kpi_tiles: Large numeric metrics, sparklines (via Recharts), up/down delta indicators.

buttons.public: Solid black or burgundy, sharp corners, dramatic hover states (opacity or subtle scale).
buttons.admin: Shadcn defaults modified for sharp edges (rounded-sm), high contrast.

sidebar.branding: Include 'Powered by Fundle' clearly at the bottom.

public_hero.description: Cinematic editorial photograph of a premium Indian women's western wear fashion model.

luxury_texture.description: Close-up macro shot of premium fabric texture in champagne and black tones.

boutique_interior.description: Chic interior of a modern fashion retail store.

editorial_model_2.description: Model posing in silver dress during a fashion photo shoot.

motion.public_site: Smooth scrolling (Lenis style), slow image pans, fade-up on scroll for text blocks.
motion.admin_dashboard: Minimal micro-interactions, instant feedback on clicks, no long transitions.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Manrope' into the global stylesheet.
Use Lucide-React for all icons, matching stroke widths to font weights.
Ensure all interactive and informational elements contain a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='kpi-sales-total').
Build the dashboard layout with a dark sidebar (#0F172A, 6px corners) and a light workspace background.
KPI cards should feature Recharts sparklines and percentage delta arrows (green/red).
Include 'Powered by Fundle' tagline in the admin sidebar.
Do not use Shadcn card component globally if it forces a specific radius. Override global radii to be sharp (0px to 2px) in the admin workspace, except the sidebar which must be 6px.
For the public site, utilize the cinematic editorial images and deep burgundy / champagne accents against the cream/black base.
For routing setup, ensure distinct navigation paths: Public (/), Enterprise Admin (/admin), Store Ops (/store), CRM (/crm).
